positive.prompt: @HumanToAction Refine this instruction internally and continue: make the border match the latest attached reference while preserving everything else.
positive.expected_behavior: Announce one internal refinement, preserve current-task context, and continue the task without returning a synthetic prompt.
positive.expected_result_shape: One brief disclosure followed by normal task execution.

positive.prompt: @HumanToAction new task: make this border match the attached reference while preserving everything else.
positive.expected_behavior: Return a paste-ready new-task handoff and do not execute its embedded task.

positive.prompt: @HumanToAction new thread: diagnose why this form submits when nothing changed.
positive.expected_behavior: Return a paste-ready new-thread handoff and do not diagnose the form in this task.

positive.prompt: $human-to-action:refine-agent-prompts new workspace: rebuild the supplied screen without changing backend behavior.
positive.expected_behavior: Return a paste-ready workspace handoff containing the material context and boundaries.

positive.prompt: @HumanToAction handoff: continue the current investigation in another agent with the evidence already gathered.
positive.expected_behavior: Return a paste-ready handoff that preserves established evidence and unresolved questions.

negative.prompt: Revamp this instruction internally and continue: explain the project in one sentence.
negative.expected_behavior: Do not activate HumanToAction; handle the request through ordinary Codex behavior.

negative.prompt: Write a prompt for another agent to make this border match the attached reference.
negative.expected_behavior: Do not activate HumanToAction; answer the ordinary prompt-writing request directly.

negative.prompt: Fix the failing unit test and run the focused suite.
negative.expected_behavior: Stay out of the way and let the relevant coding workflow handle the request.
